calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LEOPOLDO CAP'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. Sheriff to return money to debtor. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
